---
title: Kelly L Bennett
last: Bennett
middle: L
first: Kelly
people_group: technician
education: B. Phil | Penn State University
subtitle: Research Technologist
blurb: ''
description: she/her
image: ../_images/bennett-kelly.jpg
toc: false
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../_ejs/publications.ejs
  contents: ../../publications/**/*.qmd
  sort: pub_number desc
  filter-ui: true
  include:
    author: Bennett, K.
page-layout: full
about:
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image: ../_images/bennett-kelly.jpg
  links:
  - icon: envelope
    text: Email
    href: kellybennett@psu.edu
---

<hr>

::: {#about}

{{< meta blurb >}}

## Education

{{< meta education >}}

<br>
:::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Group Publications

::: {#pubs}
:::
